description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/islandoftex/images/texlive:latest. Define a single stage called build and a job named pages that runs in this stage. The pages job executes the commands: make, mkdir -p public, mv nfd-docs.pdf public/ndn-0021-nfd-guide.pdf, and echo "

See the latest version of the TR

" > public/index.html. It publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and is limited to runs on the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
